arts.ttl: Man Utd star addresses £30m Patrick Dorgu transfer and sends Ruben Amorim message
arts.sum: Manchester United are on the verge of completing a deal worth up to £30million for Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu, who'll become the club's first signing under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner launches staunch defence of Romain Esse after criticism following first Crystal Palace goal
arts.sum: Teenager scored with first touch on debut in defeat to Brentford

arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in signing Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has fallen out of favour at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign wonderkid as Arsenal and Chelsea get €60m opportunity: FT recap
arts.sum: Mathys Tel has decided to reject a €60m transfer to Tottenham as Arsenal, Chelsea and Man Utd continue to push for him. Man Utd sign wonderkid as Arsenal and Chelsea get €60m opportunity: FT recap

arts.ttl: Lecce send Dorgu to Manchester United rested and victorious
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu was part of the Lecce matchday squad for the final time on Friday...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make loan enquiry for Man Utd's Rashford
arts.sum: Aston Villa have made an enquiry over the loan signing of Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Tottenham launch shock Alejandro Garnacho bid after being snubbed by Man Utd target
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho is already a target for Chelsea but now has interest from Tottenham, who've been rejected by Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel despite agreeing a £50million deal

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: €60m signing confirmed as Rashford offer made
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: €60m signing confirmed as Rashford offer made Aston Villa have opened talks to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford .

arts.ttl: Report: Mathys Tel has now made decision on his future amid Manchester United and Arsenal links
arts.sum: Mathys Tel sparked a transfer frenzy on Friday evening as the likes of Manchester United and Arsenal were given hope after he snubbed Tottenham Hotspur....

arts.ttl: Tottenham make enquiry for Man United's Alejandro Garnacho after they were REJECTED by Bayern Munich winger Mathys Tel
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Tottenham have made an enquiry for Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho after missing out on Mathys Tel from Bayern Munich.
